summary: Complete testing of Valorización MP (FIFO), WIP, and PT closing features. All backend APIs and frontend UI working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/empresas - returns empresa id=6 correctly
Backend: GET /api/reportes/inventario-mp-valorizado?empresa_id=6 - returns 7 items with S/ 11,200.00 total
Backend: GET /api/reportes/wip?empresa_id=6 - returns 1 registro in process (01 - Eduard)
Backend: GET /api/reportes/inventario-pt-valorizado?empresa_id=6 - returns empty (no closed OPs yet)
Backend: GET /api/registros/{id}/costos-servicio - returns empty list with total 0
Backend: POST /api/registros/{id}/costos-servicio - validates registro state (can't add to closed OP)
Backend: GET /api/registros/{id}/preview-cierre - returns correct preview data
Backend: GET /api/registros/{id}/cierre-produccion - returns null for open OP
Frontend: Login form works correctly (input-username, input-password, btn-login)
Frontend: Sidebar shows 'Valorización' section with 3 items (MP Valorizado, WIP, PT Valorizado)
Frontend: MP Valorizado page shows table with 7 items, total S/ 11,200.00
Frontend: WIP page shows 1 registro (01 - Eduard) with 'Sin PT' badge
Frontend: PT Valorizado page shows 'No hay items PT' empty state
Frontend: Registro detail has 6 tabs (Tallas, Requerimiento, Reservas, Salidas, Costos, Cierre)
Frontend: Costos tab shows form (descripción, proveedor, monto) and table with 'No hay costos registrados'
Frontend: Cierre tab shows preview with 'Falta asignar PT' badge and cost summary
critical_code_review_comments: All code is well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for testing
Backend routes properly validate registro state before operations
Frontend properly handles loading and empty states
Cost values S/ 0.00 for items without costo_unitario is expected behavior per requirements
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_valorizacion.py - Created new test file for valorización APIs
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Valorización features fully functional. MP Valorizado shows 7 items with TEL-01 having value of S/ 11,200.00. WIP shows 1 registro (01 - Eduard, 350 prendas, Para Corte state). PT shows empty as no OPs closed yet. The registro detail uses tabs within a dialog (View button -> Materia Prima tab -> 6 sub-tabs). Registro ID for testing: 83fb4c4b-e4ef-459b-bf07-20f24a555123
